data.description: an invocation spell used to beseech otherworldly entities for aid, involving a known entity such as a god, primordial, demon prince, or some cosmic being that sends celestial, elemental, or fiend loyal to it. If you know the specific name of an entity, you can speak its name when casting the spell to get different results than if you do not know the name.
A demon or other fiend of challenge rating 6 or lower can be bound to serve a spellcaster. The creature is granted a saving throw at the time of binding and must succeed to avoid being bound.
